result.stdout:
Description:
  WINDOWS ONLY - Copies a file to a UNC network share with impersonation.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.UNCFileCopy [options]

Options:
  --source-file-path <source-file-path> (REQUIRED)                    The source file path.
  --destination-unc-directory <destination-unc-directory> (REQUIRED)  The UNC path to the destination directory.
  --destination-file-name <destination-file-name> (REQUIRED)          The file name for the destination, including extension.
  --username <username> (REQUIRED)                                    The username for impersonation.
  --domain <domain> (REQUIRED)                                        The domain for impersonation.
  --password <password> (REQUIRED)                                    The password for impersonation.
  --add-timestamp-suffix                                              If true, adds a timestamp suffix (yyyyMMddHHmmss) to the destination filename. [default: False]
  --version                                                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                      Show help and usage information
